zh.London St Swithun London Stone with St M: 英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 斯維圖 倫敦 史東 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 波瑟勞
zh.Great Hyde Hall, Sawbridgeworth, Hertfor: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Jocelyn於1412年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯時，他的父親Geoffery Josselyn45歲，母親Katherine29歲。他於大約1445年與Mrs. Margery Jocelyn在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他在英國倫敦被列為draper。他去世於1478年10月在英國英格蘭倫敦享年66歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 斯維圖 倫敦 史東 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 波瑟勞。

zh-hans.Great Hyde Hall, Sawbridgeworth, Hertfor: 英国英格兰賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Jocelyn于1412年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯时，他的父亲Geoffery Josselyn45岁，母亲Katherine29岁。他于大约1445年与Mrs. Margery Jocelyn在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他在英国倫敦被列为draper。他去世于1478年10月在英国英格兰倫敦享年66岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 斯維圖 倫敦 史東 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 波瑟勞。

nameMeanings.name: Jocelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Mireille, Jean Raymond, Marthe, Solange.
Haitian: either of English origin (see 1 above), or an altered form of French and Breton Josselin, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Joslin
meanings: from the Old French personal name Goscelin, Gosselin, Joscelin, from ancient Germanic Goz(e)lin, a diminutive of a short form of compound names based on the element goz (from gaut, an ethnic name meaning ‘Geat’ or ‘Goth’; see Goss ).
alternatively, perhaps a diminutive of the Old French personal name Josse (Old Breton Judoc); see Joyce .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Jocelyn was born in 1412, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffery Josselyn, was 45 and his mother, Katherine, was 29. He married Mrs. Margery Jocelyn about 1445, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as draper in London, England. He died in October 1478, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in London St Swithun London Stone with St Mary Bothaw, Middlesex, England.

fr.London St Swithun London Stone with St M: London St Swithun London Stone with St Mary Bothaw, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Jocelyn est né en 1412, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffery Josselyn, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Katherine, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Margery Jocelyn environ 1445, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est draper à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé en octobre 1478, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à London St Swithun London Stone with St Mary Bothaw, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.London St Swithun London Stone with St M: London St Swithun London Stone with St Mary Bothaw, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Jocelyn 1412 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffery Josselyn 45 und seine Mutter Katherine 29. Er hat um 1445 in London, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Margery Jocelyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als draper in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb im Oktober 1478 im Alter von 66 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London St Swithun London Stone with St Mary Bothaw, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Jocelyn è nato il nel 1412 nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffery Josselyn, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Katherine, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Margery Jocelyn circa 1445, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come draper nel London, England. Morì nel ottobre 1478, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a London St Swithun London Stone with St Mary Bothaw, Middlesex, England.

ja.Great Hyde Hall, Sawbridgeworth, Hertfor: イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Jocelynが1412年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで生まれた時，父Geoffery Josselynは45歳，母Katherineは29歳であった。約1445年にイギリスイギリスロンドンでMrs. Margery Jocelynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。イギリスロンドンでの職業はdraperと記録されている。彼は1478年10月にイギリスイギリスロンドンで66歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト スウィスウン ロンドン ストーン ウィス スト マリー ボサウにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Swithun London Stone with St M: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 스위툰 런던 스톤 위스 스트 메리 벗호
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Jocelyn(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffery Josselyn(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Mrs. Margery Jocelyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 draper이었다. 그는 1478년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 스위툰 런던 스톤 위스 스트 메리 벗호에 묻혔다.

pt.London St Swithun London Stone with St M: London St Swithun London Stone with St Mary Bothaw, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Jocelyn nasceu em 1412, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffery Josselyn, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Katherine, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Margery Jocelyn aproximadamente 1445, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como draper em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1478, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em London St Swithun London Stone with St Mary Bothaw, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Swithun London Stone with St M: лондон ст свитун лондон стоун вит ст мэри ботав, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Jocelyn родился в 1412 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffery Josselyn было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Margery Jocelyn около 1445 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии draper в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер октябрь 1478 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности лондон ст свитун лондон стоун вит ст мэри ботав, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Jocelyn nació en 1412, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffery Josselyn, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Katherine, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mrs. Margery Jocelyn aproximadamente 1445, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era draper en London, Inglaterra. Murió en octubre de 1478, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en London St Swithun London Stone with St Mary Bothaw, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
